chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln. No. S – 498 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of bail application 17.10.2024 Mr. Pervaiz Ali Siyal, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the complainant Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Applicant is present in Court on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant has been acquitted by learned trial Court, therefore, under instructions, he does not press this bail applications. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI
